title: Proclamation No. 92, s. 1936
text:
PROCLAMATION 92

EXCLUDING FROM THE OPERATION OF PROCLAMATION NO. 24, SERIES OF 1926, AND OPENING TO DISPOSITION A CERTAIN PORTION OF THE PRIVATE DOMAIN OF THE COMMONWEALTH GOVERNMENT OF THE PHILIPPINES SITUATED IN THE CITY OF MANILA.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Public Works and Communications, concurred in by the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce, I hereby exclude from the operation of Proclamation Numbered Twenty-four, series of nineteen hundred and twenty-six, and open to disposition in accordance with the provisions of Act Numbered Thirty hundred and thirty-eight, the following-described parcel of the private domain of the Commonwealth Government of the Philippines, situated in the City of Manila, Island of Luzon, and described in the attached Bureau of Public Works plan, to wit:

Lot “A.”—Beginning at a point marked 1 on sketch plan, S. 65ْ 53’ E., 13.10 m. from B. P. W. No. 21, thence S. 65ْ 54’ W. 2.00 m. to point 4; S. 35ْ 26’ W. 2.00 m. to point 5; S. 26ْ 36’ W. 2.00m. to point 6; S. 18ْ 14’ W. 2.00 m. to point 7; S. 8ْ 02’ W. 2.00 m. to point 8; S. 1ْ 17’ E. 2.00 m. to point 9; S. 11ْ 34’ E. 2.00 m. to point 10; S. 19ْ 58’ E. 2.40 m. to point 11; N. 68ْ 53’ E. 34.61 m. to point 12; N. 9ْ 11’ E. 12.75 m. to point 13; N. 9ْ 11’ E. 0.74 m. to point 14; S. 65ْ 17’ W. 1.93 m. to point 15; N. 72ْ 43’ W. 27.29 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 453.753 square meters.

Bounded on the north, by proposed sidewalk; on the southeast, by property of the Philippine Telephone and Telegraph Company vs. Insular Government of the Philippine Islands; on the south, by the property division, Bureau of Posts; and on the west and northwest, by proposed sidewalk.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this fourteenth day of October, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and thirty-six and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the first.

[SEAL]

President of the Philippines

By the President:

Secretary of the Interior
